userStories.title: Extend TicketLink schema + IVcsProvider commits method + ticket ref matcher utility
userStories.description: Add `linkType` field to `TicketLink` model with default `"url"`. Add `VcsCommit` interface and `listPrCommits()` method to `IVcsProvider`. Implement `containsTicketRef()` and `extractTicketRefs()` in a ticket ref matcher utility.
acceptanceCriteria: TicketLink model has a new field `linkType` with default `"url"` - existing entries unaffected by migration
`GitHubProvider.listPrCommits(12)` calls `GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/12/commits` and returns array of `VcsCommit` with `sha`, `message`, `authorLogin`, `url`, `date`
`GitHubProvider.listPrCommits(99999)` throws `NotFoundAppException` when GitHub returns 404
`containsTicketRef('KODA-42: fix bug', 'KODA', 42)` returns `true`
`containsTicketRef('koda-42 fix bug', 'KODA', 42)` returns `true` (case-insensitive)
`containsTicketRef('fix bug in KODA-43', 'KODA', 42)` returns `false` (different number)
`containsTicketRef('fix bug', 'KODA', 42)` returns `false` (no reference)
`containsTicketRef('prefixKODA-42suffix', 'KODA', 42)` returns `false` (not a word boundary match)
`extractTicketRefs('KODA-42 and PROJ-7 mentioned')` returns `[{ key: 'KODA', number: 42 }, { key: 'PROJ', number: 7 }]`

userStories.title: Link extractor service + integration with PR creation and PR status sync
userStories.description: Create `vcs-link-extractor.service.ts` with `extractLinksFromPr()` that: (1) Gets PR head branch from `provider.getPullRequestStatus()`, (2) Creates `TicketLink` with `linkType='branch'`, (3) Gets PR commits via `provider.listPrCommits()`, (4) Filters commits matching ticket ref pattern, (5) Creates `TicketLink` entries with `linkType='commit'` for each match. Integrate after `createPrForTicket()` and after `syncPrStatus()`.
acceptanceCriteria: `extractLinksFromPr()` creates a `TicketLink` with `linkType='branch'` for the PR's head branch URL `https://github.com/{owner}/{repo}/tree/{branchName}`
`extractLinksFromPr()` creates `TicketLink` entries with `linkType='commit'` for each PR commit whose message contains the ticket ref (case-insensitive `{KEY}-{NUMBER}` pattern)
`extractLinksFromPr()` does not create duplicate links - upserts on `@@unique([ticketId, url])`
`extractLinksFromPr()` skips commits whose message does not contain the ticket ref
After `createPrForTicket()` completes, `extractLinksFromPr()` is called to create the branch link
After `syncPrStatus()` updates a `TicketLink`, `extractLinksFromPr()` is called to pick up new commits
When GitHub API fails during commit listing, the branch link is still created and the error is logged as a warning

userStories.title: Web grouped VCS links display + CLI ticket show links + webhook synchronize handler
userStories.description: Display grouped VCS links on web ticket detail page (PRs, branches, commits sections). Update CLI `ticket show` to display links grouped by type. Handle `pull_request.synchronize` webhook action to capture new commits. Add i18n keys for en and zh.
acceptanceCriteria: Web ticket detail page VCS section groups links by `linkType`: PRs, branches, and commits displayed in separate subsections
Web PR subsection shows PR number, status badge, and clickable link
Web branch subsection shows branch name as a clickable link to GitHub
Web commit subsection shows abbreviated SHA (7 chars) and commit message as a clickable link to GitHub
Web commit subsection shows commits in reverse chronological order (newest first)
`koda ticket show <ref>` output displays linked branches and commits in the links section, grouped by type
`koda ticket show <ref> --json` output includes `linkType` field on each entry in `links[]`
`POST /projects/:slug/vcs-webhook` with `pull_request.synchronize` event calls `extractLinksFromPr()` to capture new commits
i18n keys exist in both `en` and `zh` for branch/commit link display labels

analysis:
## Key Files

### API - Schema & Models
- `apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma`: `TicketLink` model (lines 199-213) with `@@unique([ticketId, url])`. Need to add `linkType` field with default `"url"`.
- `apps/api/src/vcs/types.ts`: `VcsIssue`, `CreatePrParams`, `VcsPrStatus`, `VcsPullRequest` interfaces. Need to add `VcsCommit` interface with `sha`, `message`, `authorLogin`, `url`, `date`.

### API - VCS Provider
- `apps/api/src/vcs/vcs-provider.ts`: `IVcsProvider` interface. Need to add `listPrCommits(prNumber: number): Promise<VcsCommit[]>` method.
- `apps/api/src/vcs/providers/github.provider.ts`: Implements `IVcsProvider`. `getPullRequestStatus()` exists at lines 218-236. Need to implement `listPrCommits()` calling `GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{pr_number}/commits`.
- `apps/api/src/vcs/branch-name.util.ts`: Existing utility that may inform branch URL building.

### API - VCS Services
- `apps/api/src/vcs/vcs-pr-sync.service.ts`: `syncPrStatus()` syncs PR state (lines 100-187), `handleMergedPrAutoTransition()` (lines 200-267). After updating PR state, need to call `extractLinksFromPr()` to pick up new commits.
- `apps/api/src/vcs/vcs-webhook.service.ts`: `handlePullRequest()` routes events (lines 189-232). Handles: opened, closed, merged, ready_for_review, reopened, converted_to_draft. Missing: `synchronize` action should call `extractLinksFromPr()`.
- `apps/api/src/ticket-links/ticket-links.service.ts`: `create()` method with upsert on `(ticketId, url)` (lines 52-79), `findByTicket()` (lines 81-90). Need to add `linkType` parameter.


### API - i18n
- `apps/api/src/i18n/{en,zh}/`: Need new i18n keys for branch/commit link display labels.

### CLI
- `apps/cli/src/commands/ticket.ts`: `show` subcommand. Need to display links grouped by `linkType`.
- `apps/cli/src/commands/ticket-show.spec.ts`: Existing test file pattern.

### Web
- Web ticket detail page location needs verification. Searched `apps/web/pages/**/[ref].vue` - no match. Check `apps/web/pages/` structure for ticket detail page.
- `apps/web/i18n/locales/{en,zh}.json`: Need i18n keys for branch/commit link display labels.

## Architecture Decisions

1. **linkType values**: `"url"` (default, existing links), `"pr"` (Phase 2), `"branch"` (Phase 4), `"commit"` (Phase 4)
2. **Upsert strategy**: `@@unique([ticketId, url])` already exists - upsert on duplicate URL per ticket
3. **Commit filtering**: Match `{KEY}-{NUMBER}` pattern case-insensitively in commit message using word boundary regex
4. **GitHub API limit**: 250 commits max (pagination limit) - fetch first page only, log if truncated
5. **Error handling**: On GitHub API error during commit listing, branch link still created, error logged as warning

6. **Webhook `synchronize`**: Fires when new commits pushed - call `extractLinksFromPr()` to capture them

## Migration Notes
- Prisma migration: Add `linkType` field with default `"url"` - existing links unaffected
- No breaking changes to existing API contracts
- `VcsCommit` interface is additive - no existing code affected

## Risks
- `synchronize` webhook action not currently handled - need to add case in `handlePullRequest()` switch
- `listPrCommits` GitHub API response structure needs verification
- Web ticket detail page path needs confirmation
